lobby_text:
History
Settings
Ready to join?
Software Engineer (SDE) interview — you're answering by typing.
No microphone needed, so we won't ask for one. Your interviewer's questions appear as text, and you'll type your answers. Take the time you need to think and type — your session length is the only clock. You're scored on what you say, not how you said it.
Before you join

Your typed answers are processed to generate your feedback and scorecard. Your transcript and report are retained for a limited period, and you can download or delete your data any time from Settings.

Join interview
